creator: sgeorgieva

testElementDTOList.targetRawValue:
-->

Check Alarm: High Volume


In this test, the effects of the VT-High setting are tested. The test is passed, if
  1. an application of 111% of the set VT-High limit causes a "VT-High" alarm, but the ventilation is continued as if no alarm was present.
  2. the applied tidal volume on an "Inspiratory volume regulation" alarm is 1.5 times the set "VT-High" limit and the inspiratory time is shorter than before the alarm. (The applied breath gets aborted)

The test uses three control-variables to evaluate the criterions above:
  • [is_valid]: is initially set to 1. If a script finds a value outside of the tolerances, the variable is set to -1
  • [error_code]: is initially set to 200. If is_valid = -1, then the value in [error_code] represents the script that reported a failed value
  • [successful_scripts]: counts the amount of executed scripts.

The Pipeline for this test is:

(ASL)->(Setup)->(Exec |1/3)->(Exec |2/3)->(Exec |3/3)->(Scripting)->(Evaluation)->(CleanUp)

  • (ASL)-Block: Sets ASL resistance and compliance according to the product requirements.
  • (Setup)-Block: Sets predefined values according to the product requirements.
  • (Exec |1/3)-Block:
    1. Starts ventilation.
    2. Waits for 90 seconds.
    3. Stores one measurement of the inspiration time, expiration time, PEEP and inspiration volume measured by the flow-analyser in the variables [INSPT_FLOWANALYSER_START], [EXPT_FLOWANALYSER_START], [PEEP_FLOWANALYSER_START], [VTI_FLOWANALYSER_START]
      4. .
  • (Exec |2/3)-Block:
    1. Sets the VT-High alarm to 448ml (approximately 90% of the currently applied expiration volume)
    2. Waits for the "VT-High" alarm
      3. Note: the internal code for "VT-High" alarm is 2804 00282
    3. Waits for 12 seconds
    4. Stores one measurement of the inspiration time, expiration time, PEEP and inspiration volume measured by the flow-analyser in the variables [INSPT_FLOWANALYSER_MIDDLE], [EXPT_FLOWANALYSER_MIDDLE], [PEEP_FLOWANALYSER_MIDDLE], [VTI_FLOWANALYSER_MIDDLE]
      5. .
  • (Exec |3/3)-Block:
    1. Sets the VT-High alarm to 280ml (approximately 50% of the applied expiration volume at the start of the test)
    2. Waits for the "Vt high breath terminated" alarm
      3. Note: the internal code for "Vt high breath terminated" alarm is 2805 00212
    3. Waits for 5 seconds
    4. Stores one measurement of the inspiration time, expiration time, PEEP and inspiration volume measured by the flow-analyser in the variables [INSPT_FLOWANALYSER_END], [EXPT_FLOWANALYSER_END], [PEEP_FLOWANALYSER_END], [VTI_FLOWANALYSER_END]
      5. .
  • (Scripting)-Block:
    1. Sets control variables [is_valid] = 1, [error_code] = 200 and [successful_scripts] = 0
    2. Evaluates, if the stored varaibles in (Exec |1/3) are the same as in (Exec |2/3)
    3. Evaluates, if the stored inspiration time in (Exec |3/3) is smaller than in (Exec |1/3)
  • (Evaluation)-Block:
    1. Evaluates, if all scripts in (Scripting) were executed
    2. Evaluates, that [is_valid] is still 1
    3. Evaluates, that [error_code] is 200
    4. Evaluates the applied inspiration volume stored in [VTI_FLOWANALYSER_END]
  • (CleanUp)-Block: Stops ventilation.

testElementDTOList.targetRawValue: Check, that Inspiration time of the first two captures is the same
Check, that expiration time of the first two captures is the same
Check, that PEEP of the first two captures is the same
Check, that Inspiration volume of the first two captures is the same
Check, that Inspiration gets aborted (lower Inspiration time than before)
Check, that all scripts were successfully executed
Check, that no script found a invalid result
